title: Ananta Test Coverage and CI Workflow Roadmap
purpose: Track missing tests, CI workflow hardening, and quality visibility without slowing the default development loop.
principles: Keep push and pull_request CI fast enough for normal development.
Run expensive E2E, chaos, and upgrade tests in isolated workflows.
Prefer deterministic local mocks in default CI; keep paid live-provider checks opt-in.
Do not disable valuable tests; isolate heavy checks with explicit workflows and strict timeouts.
Focus roadmap scope on open work only and remove already implemented tasks.

must_include: release reproducibility gate without image build
must_avoid: full browser E2E on every PR
full image build gates on every PR
real paid LLM calls in default CI

must_include: optional live LLM smoke with strict token limits

recommended_workflows.name: Quality And Docs
recommended_workflows.purpose: Fast default CI for normal development.

recommended_workflows.name: Backend Isolated Flows
recommended_workflows.purpose: Run heavier backend integration paths outside the default CI set.

recommended_workflows.name: Coverage Report
recommended_workflows.purpose: Generate backend and frontend coverage artifacts without slowing each PR.

recommended_workflows.name: Security Abuse Split
recommended_workflows.purpose: Isolate heavy negative security tests from default CI.

recommended_workflows.name: E2E Compose
recommended_workflows.purpose: Run Docker Compose browser/API E2E and upload artifacts.
recommended_workflows.notes: Workflow exists; pending trigger expansion to main and full-ci label.

recommended_workflows.name: Chaos And Timeout Tests
recommended_workflows.purpose: Validate timeout handling, recovery, and multi-agent race boundaries.

recommended_workflows.name: Container Pull Smoke
recommended_workflows.purpose: Verify published GHCR image pull/start/health after release.

recommended_workflows.name: Live Provider Smoke
recommended_workflows.purpose: One minimal hosted LLM request with strict token and timeout limits.

todo_groups.goal: Add explicit backend and frontend coverage reporting.
todo_groups.why: Current CI is broad but still lacks a dedicated coverage workflow and baseline reporting output.

tasks.title: Add backend coverage workflow job and artifact upload
acceptance: coverage.xml is uploaded as artifact
terminal summary includes total backend coverage
job remains outside mandatory PR blocking until baseline is stable

tasks.title: Add frontend unit coverage execution and artifact upload
acceptance: frontend coverage artifact is uploaded
coverage summary appears in logs
default frontend-build path stays fast

tasks.title: Introduce realistic coverage thresholds after baseline
acceptance: thresholds are based on measured baseline
critical backend modules get stricter gates than glue code

todo_groups.goal: Close remaining authz matrix and security-workflow split gaps.
todo_groups.why: Security tests exist, but workflow separation and explicit endpoint-role matrix coverage are still open.

tasks.title: Create dedicated security-abuse workflow using existing negative tests
acceptance: workflow file exists and runs selected negative tests
workflow supports nightly and label-based execution
default PR CI runtime is not impacted

tasks.title: Add explicit endpoint x role authorization matrix tests
acceptance: anonymous is denied for protected endpoints
user role cannot perform admin actions
worker identity cannot perform hub-admin actions
table-driven tests document expected role behavior

todo_groups.goal: Add deterministic race and timeout regression tests.
todo_groups.why: Multi-agent orchestration is vulnerable to duplicate claims and timeout corruption without explicit tests.

tasks.title: Ensure two workers cannot claim the same task simultaneously
acceptance: parallel claim requests produce exactly one winner
loser receives deterministic conflict response
task history stores only one claim event

tasks.title: Ensure expired leases can be reclaimed safely
acceptance: expired lease is not treated as active
new worker can reclaim after expiry
late completion from expired lease is rejected or reconciled

tasks.title: Ensure concurrent autopilot ticks do not duplicate dispatch
acceptance: concurrent tick_once calls do not duplicate execution
locking or idempotency behavior is asserted

tasks.title: Worker timeout handling remains bounded and retry-safe
acceptance: timeout transitions task into bounded failure state
task remains retryable or escalated explicitly
test does not leave hanging background work

tasks.title: Research backend timeout is bounded and auditable
acceptance: timeout is enforced
partial result is not treated as verified
review remains required on uncertain result

tasks.title: Shell session crash cannot corrupt task state
acceptance: crash marks execution failed with explicit reason
task history captures failure context
subsequent execution can start a fresh session

todo_groups.goal: Test upgrade behavior against older persisted structures.
todo_groups.why: Legacy task/config/artifact records must remain readable across releases.

tasks.title: Validate old config upgrades to current model safely
acceptance: missing new keys get safe defaults
legacy values are preserved where compatible
unsafe implicit defaults are not introduced

tasks.title: Validate old task records render in current read models
acceptance: legacy records without new fields do not crash
new fields receive deterministic defaults
frontend read model contract remains satisfied

tasks.title: Validate old artifact and memory records remain queryable
acceptance: legacy artifacts can still be listed
legacy extracted docs are handled safely
legacy memory entries do not break detail views

todo_groups.why: Release pipelines should verify pull/start behavior on published images and strengthen main-branch compose signal.

tasks.title: After GHCR publish, verify docker pull, start, and health
acceptance: docker pull ghcr.io/<owner>/ananta-quickstart-no-ollama:<tag> succeeds
container starts with expected runtime env
health endpoint responds successfully

tasks.title: Expand compose E2E trigger policy for main and full-ci label
acceptance: workflow supports push-to-main or equivalent protected branch signal
workflow supports full-ci label trigger for PRs
expansion does not regress normal PR runtime budget

todo_groups.goal: Improve quick visibility of CI health and test surface size.
todo_groups.why: Maintainers need immediate workflow and test-count visibility from README and CI logs.

tasks.title: Add useful CI workflow badges to README
acceptance: Quality And Docs badge exists
Backend Isolated Flows badge exists
optional smoke badge can be included where stable

tasks.title: Print collected backend/frontend test counts in CI summaries
acceptance: backend pipeline prints collected test count summary
frontend pipeline prints unit test count summary
isolated flow workflow prints a test-count signal

manual_workflow_candidates.reason: Coverage is valuable but can slow PR CI; run weekly or manually until thresholds stabilize.
Heavy negative security scenarios should run nightly or on explicitly labeled PRs.
Race and timeout simulations are expensive and not ideal for every PR.
Full Docker browser checks are expensive but valuable on main and before releases.
Validates publishability and runtime viability of release artifacts.

short_term: Coverage workflow exists and uploads backend/frontend artifacts
medium_term: Coverage thresholds are introduced after baseline
Race and timeout tests cover claim, lease, and crash paths
Migration tests replace current scaffold-only contract
Compose E2E trigger policy includes main and full-ci label
long_term: Release-candidate validation includes pull smoke and migration checks
Weekly chaos workflow validates failure recovery
Security-sensitive code paths have explicit negative-test ownership

notes: Already implemented roadmap items were removed from this file to keep execution focus.
Security boundary and golden-path E2E coverage already exists in current test suites.
docs/testing.md already documents workflow/test categories; this roadmap keeps only remaining docs tasks.
Keep heavy workflows opt-in or scheduled to protect contributor feedback loop speed.
goal: Close remaining CI and test roadmap gaps while preserving fast default development feedback loops.

summary_notes: Removed already-implemented items (security boundary tests, frontend golden-path E2E coverage, compose log artifact upload, release image gate split, testing guide matrix).
Roadmap now contains open items only and aligns with current workflow filenames.
Task-track summary fields were restored for consistency checks and stage progress accounting.
